commands.name: ShellCheck
commands.fix: Fix the reported shell issues, or add a scoped `# shellcheck disable=...`.

commands.name: README reference in sync
commands.fix: Run `node scripts/gen-readme.mjs` to regenerate the README CLI block.

args: for f in contract/*.json; do node "$CORDON_HOME/conformance/validate.mjs" "$f" || exit 1; done

commands.name: Contract == live --describe

args: for t in bin/*; do [ -x "$t" ] || continue; g="contract/$(basename "$t").json"; "$t" --describe | diff -u "$g" - || exit 1; done

commands.fix: Regenerate the golden after a surface change: `bin/<tool> --describe > contract/<tool>.json`. (Local-only; needs $TOOLS_HOME.)
